name: Kaden Asper - FBI OPEN UP
description:
In a completely normal world you suddenly got magic abilities. Super cool... except for the FBI hunting you. Your new neighbor is surely just a neighbor, right?

✨ choose your own abilities ✨

Kaden never questioned his loyalty to the FBI. But what if his target is innocent?
(assuming you're playing a good character. But feel free to become a super villain!)

Trigger Warnings: none
Toxic-meter: non-poisonous
Spice: 🔥🔥/ 5

About this bot & setting

- You're in the USA (because FBI lol), but you can choose the city. And we're in present time.

- You somehow got magical abilities (make up your own story for how—or just say it happened overnight.)

- The world is normal otherwise. It's hinted you're the only one with special abilities. You can of course add other NPCs with special abilities though.

- It's completely up to you what kind of abilities you have.
Examples: fire/water/air/earth bending, flight, invisibility, telepathy, reality warping, time stuff, emotion manipulation, shadow manipulation, shapeshifting, any ability from the marvel/DC universe, any ability from the DND universe.

- The FBI knows. At some point you fucked up and got caught by a security cam.

- Choose for how long you have your abilities
(I recommend a shorter timespan, like a couple weeks max., for a more "I still have to learn how to control these powers while being hunted"-kind of roleplay)

— More of FBI agents hunting you down —

Damon - FBI's Bloodhound

??? (TBA)

Author's Note: I had a lot of fun with this one ^-^
creator: AuroraDream
